focus: Learn the number-image system for 00–19 and the first 20 elements. Build the first two palace rooms and practise linking element image + atomic number image + locus.
Extend the number-image system to 20–39. Review elements 1–20 and add elements 21–40 in rooms 3 and 4. Do two speed-recall rounds.
Extend the number-image system to 40–59. Add elements 41–60. Practise saying symbol, name, and atomic number aloud from the palace.
Extend the number-image system to 60–79. Add elements 61–80. Start noticing families: alkali metals, halogens, noble gases, lanthanides.
Finish the number-image system 80–99. Add elements 81–100. Run forward and backward recall drills from random loci.
Add elements 101–118. Practise full-table walkthroughs, then quiz yourself on random symbols and atomic numbers. Tighten any weak images.
Do an intensive review: full palace run, random number drill 00–99, random element drill 1–118, and a teach-back session where you explain the table to someone else or record yourself.
